verbatim_quote: So I won't go into the details of how this one is actually derived, but it comes from roughly the pass at k function, and we arrive at it using a sort of beta regression problem that relates it to the Chinchilla scaling.
gloss: [PRIMITIVE] So I won't go into the details of how this one is actually derived, but it comes from roughly the pass at k function, and we arrive at it using a sort of beta regression problem...
